H3437.long_def: Jashub, the name of two Israelites; Jashub.

H3460.long_def: Jishmajah, the name of two Israelites; Ishmaiah.

H5087.long_def: to promise (pos., to do or give something to God); (make a) vow.

H5088.long_def: a promise (to God); also (concretely) a thing promised; vow(-ed).

H5090.long_def: to drive forth (a person, an animal or chariot), i.e. lead, carry away; reflexively, to proceed (i.e. impel or guide oneself); also (from the panting induced by effort), to sigh; acquaint, bring (away), carry away, drive (away), lead (away, forth), (be) guide, lead (away, forth).

H5091.long_def: to groan, i.e. bewail; hence (through the idea of crying aloud), to assemble (as if on proclamation); lament, wail.

H5095.long_def: properly, to run with a sparkle, i.e. flow; hence (transitively), to conduct, and (by inference) to protect, sustain; carry, feed, guide, lead (gently, on).

H5096.long_def: Nahalal or Nahalol, a place in Palestine; Nahalal, Nahallal, Nahalol.

H5101.long_def: to bray (as an ass), scream (from hunger); bray.

H5102.long_def: to sparkle, i.e. (figuratively) be cheerful; hence (from the sheen of a running stream) to flow, i.e. (figuratively) assemble; flow (together), be lightened.

H5103.long_def: a river, especially the Euphrates; river, stream.

H5104.long_def: a stream (including the sea; expectation the Nile, Euphrates, etc.); figuratively, prosperity; flood, river.

H5106.long_def: to refuse, forbid, dissuade, or neutralize; break, disallow, discourage, make of none effect.

H5107.long_def: to germinate, i.e. (figuratively) to (causatively, make) flourish; also (of words), to utter; bring forth (fruit), make cheerful, increase.

H5109.long_def: Nobai, an Israelite; Nebai (from the margin).

H5115.long_def: to rest (as at home); causatively (through the implied idea of beauty), to celebrate (with praises); keep at home, prepare an habitation.

H5116.long_def: (adjectively) at home; hence (by implication of satisfaction) lovely; also (noun) a home, of God (temple), men (residence), flocks (pasture), or wild animals (den); comely, dwelling (place), fold, habitation, pleasant place, sheepcote, stable, tarried.

H5117.long_def: to rest, i.e. settle down; used in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, intransitive, transitive and causative (to dwell, stay, let fall, place, let alone, withdraw, give comfort, etc.); cease, be confederate, lay, let down, (be) quiet, remain, (cause to, be at, give, have, make to) rest, set down. Compare 3241.

H5121.long_def: Navith, a place in Palestine; Naioth (from the margin).

H5125.long_def: to resprout, i.e. propagate by shoots; figuratively, to be perpetual; be continued.

H5126.long_def: Nun or Non, the father of Joshua; Non, Nun.

H5127.long_def: to flit, i.e. vanish away (subside, escape; causatively, chase, impel, deliver); × abate, away, be displayed, (make to) flee (away, -ing), put to flight, × hide, lift up a standard.

H5128.long_def: to waver, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively (as subjoined); continually, fugitive, × make, to (go) up and down, be gone away, (be) move(-able, -d), be promoted, reel, remove, scatter, set, shake, sift, stagger, to and fro, be vagabond, wag, (make) wander (up and down).

H5130.long_def: to quiver (i.e. vibrate up and down, or rock to and fro); used in a great variety of applications (including sprinkling, beckoning, rubbing, bastinadoing, sawing, waving, etc.); lift up, move, offer, perfume, send, shake, sift, strike, wave.

H5133.long_def: a pinion (or wing feather); often (collectively) plumage; feather(-s), ostrich.

H5136.long_def: to be sick, i.e. (figuratively) distressed; be full of heaviness.

H5137.long_def: to spirt, i.e. besprinkle (especially in expiation); sprinkle.

H5139.long_def: separate, i.e. consecrated (as prince, a Nazirite); hence (figuratively from the latter) an unpruned vine (like an unshorn Nazirite); Nazarite (by a false alliteration with Nazareth), separate(-d), vine undressed.

H5140.long_def: to drip, or shed by trickling; distil, drop, flood, (cause to) flow(-ing), gush out, melt, pour (down), running water, stream.

H5142.long_def: to suffer (causatively, inflict) loss; have (en-) damage, hurt(-ful).

H5144.long_def: to hold aloof, i.e. (intransitivey) abstain (from food and drink, from impurity, and even from divine worship (i.e. apostatize)); specifically, to set apart (to sacred purposes), i.e. devote; consecrate, separate(-ing, self).

H5145.long_def: properly, something set apart, i.e. (abstractly) dedication (of a priet or Nazirite); hence (concretely) unshorn locks; also (by implication) a chaplet (especially of royalty); consecration, crown, hair, separation.

H5148.long_def: to guide; by implication, to transport (into exile, or as colonists); bestow, bring, govern, guide, lead (forth), put, straiten.

H5150.long_def: properly, consoled; abstractly, solace; comfort(-able), repenting.

H5152.long_def: Nachor, the name of the grandfather and a brother of Abraham; Nahor.

H5157.long_def: to inherit (as a (figurative) mode of descent), or (generally) to occupy; causatively, to bequeath, or (generally) distribute, instate; divide, have (inheritance), take as a heritage, (cause to, give to, make to) inherit, (distribute for, divide (for, for an, by), give for, have, leave for, take (for)) inheritance, (have in, cause to, be made to) possess(-ion).

H5158.long_def: a stream, especially a winter torrent; (by implication) a (narrow) valley (in which a brook runs); also a shaft (of a mine); brook, flood, river, stream, valley.

H5159.long_def: properly, something inherited, i.e. (abstractly) occupancy, or (concretely) an heirloom; generally an estate, patrimony or portion; heritage, to inherit, inheritance, possession. Compare 5158.

H5161.long_def: a Nechelamite, or descendant of Nechlam; Nehelamite.

H5162.long_def: properly, to sigh, i.e. breathe strongly; by implication, to be sorry, i.e. (in a favorable sense) to pity, console or (reflexively) rue; or (unfavorably) to avenge (oneself); comfort (self), ease (one's self), repent(-er,-ing, self).

H5166.long_def: Nechemjah, the name of three Israelites; Nehemiah.

H5171.long_def: Nacharai or Nachrai, an Israelite; Naharai, Nahari.

H5172.long_def: properly, to hiss, i.e. whisper a (magic) spell; generally, to prognosticate; × certainly, divine, enchanter, (use) × enchantment, learn by experience, × indeed, diligently observe.

H5176.long_def: Nachash, the name of two persons apparently non-Israelite; Nahash.

H5178.long_def: copper, hence, something made of that metal, i.e. coin, a fetter; figuratively, base (as compared with gold or silver); brasen, brass, chain, copper, fetter (of brass), filthiness, steel.

H5181.long_def: to sink, i.e. descend; causatively, to press or lead down; be broken, (cause to) come down, enter, go down, press sore, settle, stick fast.

H5182.long_def: to descend; causatively, to bring away, deposit, depose; carry, come down, depose, lay up, place.

H5183.long_def: a descent, i.e. imposition, unfavorable (punishment) or favorable (food); restfulness; lighting down, quiet(-ness), to rest, be set on.

H5184.long_def: Nachath, the name of an Edomite and of two Israelites; Nahath.

H5186.long_def: to stretch or spread out; by implication, to bend away (including moral deflection); used in a great variety of application (as follows); afternoon, apply, bow (down, -ing), carry aside, decline, deliver, extend, go down, be gone, incline, intend, lay, let down, offer, outstretched, overthrown, pervert, pitch, prolong, put away, shew, spread (out), stretch (forth, out), take (aside), turn (aside, away), wrest, cause to yield.

H5189.long_def: a tendril (as an offshoot); battlement, branch, plant.

H5190.long_def: to lift; by implication, to impose; bear, offer, take up.

H5193.long_def: properly, to strike in, i.e. fix; specifically, to plant (literally or figuratively); fastened, plant(-er).

H5194.long_def: a plant; collectively, a plantation; abstractly, a planting; plant.

H5197.long_def: to ooze, i.e. distil gradually; by implication, to fall in drops; figuratively, to speak by inspiration; drop(-ping), prophesy(-et).

H5200.long_def: a Netophathite, or inhabitant of Netophah; Netophathite.

H5201.long_def: to guard; figuratively, to cherish (anger); bear grudge, keep(-er), reserve.

H5218.long_def: smitten, i.e. (figuratively) afflicted; broken, stricken, wounded.

H5255.long_def: to tear away; destroy, pluck, root.

H5280.long_def: a Naamanite, or descendant of Naaman (collectively); Naamites.

H5283.long_def: Naaman, the name of an Israelite and of a Damascene; Naaman.

H5284.long_def: a Naamathite, or inhabitant of Naamah; Naamathite.

H5285.long_def: probably a brier; by implication, a thicket of thorny bushes; thorn.

H5295.long_def: Naaran, a place in Palestine; Naaran.

H5298.long_def: Nepheg, the name of two Israelites; Nepheg.

H5299.long_def: a sieve; border, coast, region, sieve.

H5300.long_def: Nephushesim, a Temple-servant; Nephisesim (from the margin).

H5304.long_def: Nephisim, a Temple-servant; Nephusim (from the margin).

H5305.long_def: Naphish, a son of Ishmael, and his posterity; Naphish.

H5306.long_def: shining; a gem, probably the garnet; emerald.

H5315.long_def: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental); any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, × dead(-ly), desire, × (dis-) contented, × fish, ghost,   greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, × jeopardy of) life (× in jeopardy), lust, man, me, mind, mortally, one, own, person, pleasure, (her-, him-, my-, thy-) self, them (your) -selves,   slay, soul,   tablet, they, thing, (× she) will, × would have it.

H5319.long_def: properly, wrestled; but used (in the plural) transitively, a struggle; wrestling.

H5380.long_def: to blow; by implication, to disperse; (cause to) blow, drive away.

H5381.long_def: to reach (literally or figuratively); ability, be able, attain (unto), (be able to, can) get, lay at, put, reach, remove, wax rich, × surely, (over-) take (hold of, on, upon).

H8550.long_def: perfections, i.e. (techn.) one of the epithets of the objects in the high-priest's breastplate as an emblem of complete Truth; Thummim.

H8551.long_def: to sustain; by implication, to obtain, keep fast; figuratively, to help, follow close; (take, up-) hold (up), maintain, retain, stay (up).

H8552.long_def: to complete, in a good or a bad sense, literal, or figurative, transitive or intransitive; accomplish, cease, be clean (pass-) ed, consume, have done, (come to an, have an, make an) end, fail, come to the full, be all gone, × be all here, be (make) perfect, be spent, sum, be (shew self) upright, be wasted, whole.

H8553.long_def: Timnah, the name of two places in Palestine; Timnah, Timnath, Thimnathah.

H8554.long_def: a Timnite or inhabitant of Timnah; Timnite.

H8555.long_def: Timna, the name of two Edomites; Timna, Timnah.

H8556.long_def: Timnath-Cheres, a place in Palestine; Timnath-heres, Timnath-serah.

H8559.long_def: Tamar, the name of three women and a place; Tamar.

H8561.long_def: (architectural) a palm-like pilaster (i.e. umbellate); palm tree.

H8562.long_def: properly, a scouring, i.e. soap or perfumery for the bath; figuratively, a detergent; × cleanse, (thing for) purification(-fying).

H8564.long_def: an erection, i.e. pillar (probably for a guide-board); high heap.

H8565.long_def: a monster (as preternaturally formed), i.e. a sea-serpent (or other huge marine animal); also a jackal (or other hideous land animal); dragon, whale. Compare 8577.

H8566.long_def: to present (a mercenary inducement), i.e. bargain with (a harlot); hire.

H8567.long_def: to ascribe (praise), i.e. celebrate, commemorate; lament, rehearse.

H8569.long_def: alienation; by implication, enmity; breach of promise, occasion.

H8573.long_def: a brandishing (in threat); by implication, tumult; specifically, the official undulation of sacrificial offerings; offering, shaking, wave (offering).

H8577.long_def: a marine or land monster, i.e. sea-serpent or jackal; dragon, sea-monster, serpent, whale.

H8580.long_def: properly, a hard breather, i.e. the name of two unclean creatures, a lizard and a bird (both perhaps from changing color through their irascibility), probably the tree-toad and the water-hen; mole, swan.

H8581.long_def: to loathe, i.e. (morally) detest; (make to be) abhor(-red), (be, commit more, do) abominable(-y), × utterly.

H8582.long_def: to vacillate, i.e. reel or stray (literally or figuratively); also causative of both; (cause to) go astray, deceive, dissemble, (cause to, make to) err, pant, seduce, (make to) stagger, (cause to) wander, be out of the way.

H8583.long_def: Tou or Toi, a Syrian king; Toi, Tou.

H8584.long_def: attestation, i.e. a precept, usage; testimony.

H8585.long_def: a channel (into which water is raised for irrigation); also a bandage or plaster (as placed upon a wound); conduit, cured, healing, little river, trench, watercourse.

H8586.long_def: caprice (as a fit coming on), i.e. vexation; concretely a tyrant; babe, delusion.

H8587.long_def: a secret; thing that is hid, secret.

H8590.long_def: Taanak or Tanak, a place in Palestine; Taanach, Tanach.

H8591.long_def: to cheat; by analogy, to maltreat; deceive, misuse.

H8593.long_def: a knife or razor (as making bare); also a scabbard (as being bare, i.e. empty); (pen-) knife, razor, scabbard, shave, sheath.

H8597.long_def: ornament (abstractly or concretely, literally or figuratively); beauty(-iful), bravery, comely, fair, glory(-ious), honour, majesty.

H8598.long_def: an apple (from its fragrance), i.e. the fruit or the tree (probably includ. others of the pome order, as the quince, the orange, etc.); apple (tree). See also 1054.

H8599.long_def: Tappuach, the name of two places in Palestine, also of an Israelite; Tappuah.

H8601.long_def: cookery, i.e. (concretely) a cake; baked piece.

H8602.long_def: plaster (as gummy) or slime; (figuratively) frivolity; foolish things, unsavoury, untempered.

H8603.long_def: Tophel, a place near the Desert; Tophel.

H8605.long_def: intercession, supplication; by implication, a hymn; prayer.

H8607.long_def: Tiphsach, a place in Mesopotamia; Tipsah.

H8608.long_def: to drum, i.e. play (as) on the tambourine; taber, play with timbrels.

H8610.long_def: to manipulate, i.e. seize; chiefly to capture, wield, specifically, to overlay; figuratively, to use unwarrantably; catch, handle, (lay, take) hold (on, over), stop, × surely, surprise, take.

H8612.long_def: Topheth, a place near Jerusalem; Tophet, Topheth.

H8613.long_def: Tophteh, a place of cremation; Tophet.

H8615.long_def: literally a cord (as an attachment); figuratively, expectancy; expectation(-ted), hope, live, thing that I long for.

H8616.long_def: Tikvah, the name of two Israelites; Tikvah.

H8620.long_def: Tekoa, a place in Palestine; Tekoa, Tekoah.

H8621.long_def: a Tekoite or inhabitant of Tekoah; Tekoite.

H8622.long_def: a revolution, i.e. (of the sun) course, (of time) lapse; circuit, come about, end.

H8626.long_def: to equalize, i.e. straighten (intransitive or transitive); figuratively, to compose; set in order, make straight.

H8627.long_def: to straighten up, i.e. confirm; establish.

H8628.long_def: to clatter, i.e. slap (the hands together), clang (an instrument); by analogy, to drive (a nail or tent-pin, a dart, etc.); by implication, to become bondsman by handclasping); blow (a trumpet), cast, clap, fasten, pitch (tent), smite, sound, strike, × suretiship, thrust.

H8629.long_def: a blast of a trumpet; sound.

H8631.long_def: to become (causatively, make) mighty or (figuratively) obstinate; make firm, harden, be(-come) strong.

H8633.long_def: might or (figuratively) positiveness; authority, power, strength.

H8634.long_def: Taralah, a place in Palestine; Taralah.

H8636.long_def: multiplication, i.e. percentage or bonus in addition to principal; increase, unjust gain.

H8637.long_def: to cause to walk; teach to go.

H8639.long_def: a lethargy or (by implication) trance; deep sleep.

H8640.long_def: Tirhakah, a king of Kush; Tirhakah.

H8641.long_def: a present (as offered up), especially in sacrifice or as tribute; gift, heave offering (shoulder), oblation, offered(-ing).

H8643.long_def: clamor, i.e. acclamation of joy or a battle-cry; especially clangor of trumpets, as an alarum; alarm, blow(-ing) (of, the) (trumpets), joy, jubile, loud noise, rejoicing, shout(-ing), (high, joyful) sound(-ing).

H8645.long_def: a species of tree (apparently from its slenderness), perhaps the cypress; cypress.

H8646.long_def: Terach, the father of Abraham; also a place in the Desert; Tarah, Terah.

H8650.long_def: a pole (as a mast or flagstaff); beacon, mast.

H8651.long_def: a door; by implication, a palace; gate mouth.

H8654.long_def: a Tirathite or inhabitant of an unknown Tirah; Tirathite.

H8655.long_def: Teraphim (singular or plural) a family idol; idols(-atry), images, teraphim.

H8656.long_def: Tirtsah, a place in Palestine; also an Israelitess; Tirzah.

H8657.long_def: Teresh, a eunuch of Xerxes; Teresh.

H8658.long_def: a gem, perhaps the topaz; beryl.

H8659.long_def: Tarshish, a place on the Mediterranean, hence, the ephithet of a merchant vessel (as if for or from that port); also the name of a Persian and of an Israelite; Tarshish, Tharshish.

H8660.long_def: the title of a Persian deputy or governor; Tirshatha.

H8662.long_def: Tartak, a deity of the Avvites; Tartak.

H8663.long_def: a crashing or loud clamor; crying, noise, shouting, stir.

H8664.long_def: a Tishbite or inhabitant of Tishbeh (in Gilead); Tishbite.

H8666.long_def: a recurrence (of time or place); a reply (as returned); answer, be expired, return.

H8668.long_def: rescue (literal or figurative, persons, national or spiritual); deliverance, help, safety, salvation, victory.
